rationale: In the citing paper, Homburg and Pflesser (2000) appears only as part of a grouped citation supporting a broad claim that market orientation is important in managerial processes. The paper does not engage that study's multilayer culture model, measures, or specific findings in its theory development, hypotheses, or empirical design. Core conceptual and measurement choices are instead tied to other sources (especially Kohli and Jaworski and MARKOR work), so this citation functions as background context rather than a meaningful building block.
